mods.name: Interactive Map Companion
mods.description: Real-time entity tracking for the interactive world map
features: Live entity tracking (player, NPCs, enemies, pets)

mods.name: Interactive Maps Companion
mods.description: Real-time player tracking for legacy per-zone maps
features: Live player tracking for zone maps
mods.deprecationNotice: This mod is for the legacy per-zone maps. The new World Map Companion provides a more comprehensive experience with entity tracking for multiple character types and improved features.
